title: salix × notha
intro: Salix × notha is a hybrid willow plant, resulting from the cross between Salix fragilis and Salix alba. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × notha include its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and headaches. Salix × notha can be prepared as a herbal remedy, often in the form of a tincture or infusion, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
